positive: A stylized, symmetrical minimalist illustration of a soaring mythical phoenix rising from gentle flames. The phoenix is rendered in deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, ruby red) against a stark, celestial gold background. Focus on clean, bold line work and strong silhouettes. The composition must be centered and vertically balanced, suitable for repeating patterns or apparel prints. Use high contrast and dynamic asymmetry within the central subject while maintaining a flat, poster-art aesthetic. Graphic novel style, linocut print texture, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing.
